headline: Illinois Tool Works Secures US$3b Credit Line As Valuation Stays Stretched
summary: Illinois Tool Works (NYSE:ITW) has entered into a new five year revolving credit agreement totaling US$3b. The new facility replaces the company’s previous revolving credit arrangement. The agreement is intended to support liquidity, financial flexibility, and general corporate purposes. Illinois Tool Works is a diversified industrial manufacturer with exposure to multiple end markets, from automotive components to food equipment and specialty products.
